summary: Iteration 58: Complete testing of P1 features - Pricing Page refinements and Otellerim (My Hotels) Kontenjan display. All frontend tests passed (19/19). Backend tests passed (6/6 passed, 1 skipped).

minor.issue: Provided credential agency1@demo.test / agency123 returns 401 - credential is invalid

Frontend - TEST 2: PublicNavbar (data-testid='pricing-nav-bar') found
Frontend - TEST 3: Navbar logo (data-testid='pricing-nav-logo') found
Frontend - TEST 4: Navbar links found (Ana Sayfa, Fiyatlar, Demo)
Frontend - TEST 5: Login (Giriş Yap) and Signup (Ücretsiz Deneyin) buttons found
Frontend - TEST 6: Promo banner with 'Süre Sınırlı Teklif' text found
Frontend - TEST 7: Hero section with title 'Bulut Acenta Yönetim ve Operasyon Çözümü' found
Frontend - TEST 8: Trust bar with 4 items (SSL, 7/24, Destek, Kurulum) found
Frontend - TEST 9: 4 pricing cards displayed (Giriş, Standart, Profesyonel, Platinum)
Frontend - TEST 10: All 4 pricing cards have correct data-testids
Frontend - TEST 11: Billing cycle tabs (Aylık, Yıllık) found and functional
Frontend - TEST 12: All 4 'Tüm özellikleri gör' expandable buttons found
Frontend - TEST 13: Expandable details list opens on click
Frontend - TEST 14: Pricing comparison table found
Frontend - TEST 15: FAQ accordion section present
Frontend - TEST 16: Contact section with phone, email, hours info found
Frontend - TEST 17: Footer with copyright and links found
Frontend - TEST 18: Billing toggle switch to Aylık shows monthly prices (₺4.900)
Frontend - TEST 19: Billing toggle switch to Yıllık shows yearly prices (₺49.500)
Frontend - TEST 20: Agency Hotels page shows 4 hotel cards with Kontenjan badges
Frontend - TEST 21: Kontenjan values displayed for all hotels (23, -, 18, -)
Frontend - TEST 22: Kontenjan color-coding working (green=2 for >5, gray=2 for no data)

Frontend - TEST 24: Hotel card structure complete (Name, Status, Location, Kontenjan)
Backend - test_health_check: Health endpoint returns ok
Backend - test_login_with_valid_agency_credentials: agent@acenta.test / agent123 works
Backend - test_login_with_invalid_credentials: Invalid credentials return 401
Backend - test_get_agency_hotels_returns_hotels_list: GET /api/agency/hotels returns 4 hotels
Backend - test_agency_hotels_have_allocation_field: All hotels have allocation_available (kontenjan) field
Backend - test_agency_hotels_have_required_fields: All hotels have required fields (hotel_id, hotel_name, location, status_label, allocation_available)
Backend - test_agency_hotels_unauthorized_without_token: Endpoint returns 401 without auth
action_items: Update documentation to use correct credentials: agent@acenta.test / agent123 instead of agency1@demo.test / agency123
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Pricing page has comprehensive data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Good: PublicNavbar properly implements responsive design with mobile menu toggle
Good: Pricing cards use SyrocePricingCard component with expandable details (Tüm özellikleri gör)
Good: Billing cycle toggle correctly switches between monthly and yearly views
Good: Trust bar displays 4 items as specified (SSL, 7/24, Destek, Kurulum)
Good: Pricing comparison table component (SyrocePricingComparison) present
Good: FAQ section uses SyroceFaqSection component with accordion
Good: Contact section includes phone, email, and hours with proper icons
Good: Footer includes copyright year dynamic and links to privacy/terms
Good: AgencyHotelsPage displays kontenjan for ALL hotels (not just sheet-managed)
Good: Kontenjan color-coding implemented (green > 5, amber 1-5, red = 0, gray = no data)
Good: Hotel cards have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing demo hotels: Antalya Beach Resort (kontenjan=23), Cappadocia Cave Hotel (kontenjan=-), Demo Hotel 1 (kontenjan=18), Demo Hotel 2 (kontenjan=-)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 verified two P1 features: (1) Pricing page at /pricing has all requested elements - PublicNavbar with logo and links (Ana Sayfa, Fiyatlar, Demo, Giriş Yap, Ücretsiz Deneyin), promo banner with 'Süre Sınırlı Teklif', hero section with 'Bulut Acenta Yönetim ve Operasyon Çözümü', trust bar with 4 items, 4 pricing cards (Giriş, Standart, Profesyonel, Platinum), billing cycle toggle (Aylık/Yıllık), expandable details buttons, comparison table, FAQ section, contact section, footer. (2) Agency Hotels page at /app/agency/hotels shows 'Kontenjan' badge for each hotel card with color-coding (green >5, gray no data). Working credentials: agent@acenta.test / agent123. The credential agency1@demo.test / agency123 from task description is INVALID.

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs return real data. Pricing page is public (no auth). Agency hotels endpoint requires authentication.
